owner_source: BBB Business Profile with official Kind Pest website/contact corroboration and NPMA operations decision-maker context
source_query: Raleigh NC pest_control public business listing
source_evidence: Collector found website, phone, public email, third-party contact surface, and estimate language. BBB confirms Kind Pest Control LLC as an LLC, business started 06/29/2016, incorporated 03/02/2022, lists Chris Lundeen as owner/principal/customer contact, lists other phone (919) 981-9798, and references NC Pest Control Lic 2502PW. Official About page says Kind Pest Control is locally owned and operated in North Carolina serving Raleigh, Wake Forest, Cary, and surrounding areas. Official Contact page lists a quote/contact form, info@kindpest.com, 919-981-9798, and 6516 Old Wake Forest Rd, Raleigh NC 27616. NPMA 2026 Impact Awards also lists Alysia Wrobel as VP of Operations at Kind Pest Control in Raleigh.
visible_gap: Business is locally owned with strong public identity and contact evidence, but collector noted the contact path as third-party/unclear; improve first-party quote routing, tracking, and service-area conversion paths.
offer_angle: Pest-control quote/contact-path cleanup for eco-friendly Raleigh service brand
